negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_055
prompt: The video opens with a close-up shot of a grocery store aisle, highlighting two robotic arms equipped with grippers positioned symmetrically on either side of the frame. The shelves are neatly stocked with various snack products, including prominently displayed boxes of Franzzi Matcha Chocolate Wafer Cookies, a green box of snacks with Chinese characters, and other packaged goods. A shopping cart with red handles is partially visible in the foreground. The bright indoor lighting casts distinct shadows, emphasizing the organized retail environment.  As the video progresses, a robotic arm appears on the right side of the frame, moving deliberately towards the Franzzi Matcha Chocolate Wafer Cookies package. It securely grasps the package, lifts it off the shelf, and places it into the shopping cart. The robotic arm then returns to its initial position above the shopping cart, ensuring the shelf remains organized. The scene concludes with the robotic arm returning to its starting point, leaving the shelf and cart in their original state.
